Download
Download Learn News Source Join a Community ZSF Devlog
Download Learn News Zig Software Foundation Devlog Source Join a Community
← Back to Home

Releases

You can also install Zig from a package manager.

There is a JSON version of this page.

Files are signed with minisign using this public key:

RWSGOq2NVecA2UPNdBUZykf1CCb147pkmdtYxgb3Ti+JO/wCYvhbAb/U

Setting up an automation?

If you’re automating the process of downloading Zig, you might want to learn about Community Mirrors to avoid downtime and help us save on bandwidth costs.

master
